en: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son makes a glad father, but a foolish son is a sorrow to his mother.
zh: 所羅門的箴言： 智慧的兒子使父親歡樂， 愚昧的兒子使母親憂愁。

en: Treasures gained by wickedness do not profit, but righteousness delivers from death.
zh: 不義之財毫無益處， 唯有公義能救人脫離死亡。

en: The LORD does not let the righteous go hungry, but he thwarts the craving of the wicked.
zh: 耶和華不容許義人忍受飢餓， 惡人的慾念卻無法得著。

en: A slack hand causes poverty, but the hand of the diligent makes rich.
zh: 游手好閒的，招致貧窮， 勤力工作的，得到富足。

en: He who gathers in summer is a prudent son, but he who sleeps in harvest is a son who brings shame.
zh: 夏天收聚的，是明慧的人， 收割時沉睡的，是貽羞的人。

en: Blessings are on the head of the righteous, but the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.
zh: 福祉臨到義人頭上， 強暴遮蓋惡人的口。

en: The memory of the righteous is a blessing, but the name of the wicked will rot.
zh: 義人的名必蒙稱讚， 惡人的名字卻必腐朽。

en: The wise of heart will receive commandments, but a babbling fool will come to ruin.
zh: 心存智慧的，必接受誡命； 嘴唇愚妄的，必自招滅亡。

en: Whoever walks in integrity walks securely, but he who makes his ways crooked will be found out.
zh: 行為完全的，步步安穩； 行事彎曲的，終必敗露。

en: Whoever winks the eye causes trouble, but a babbling fool will come to ruin.
zh: 以眼傳神的，使人受害； 嘴唇愚妄的，必自招滅亡。

en: The mouth of the righteous is a fountain of life, but the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.
zh: 義人的口是生命的泉源， 強暴遮蓋惡人的口。

en: Hatred stirs up strife, but love covers all offenses.
zh: 恨能挑起紛爭， 愛能遮掩一切過失。

en: On the lips of him who has understanding, wisdom is found, but a rod is for the back of him who lacks sense.
zh: 聰明人嘴裡有智慧， 無知人背上受刑杖。

en: The wise lay up knowledge, but the mouth of a fool brings ruin near.
zh: 智慧人積存知識， 愚妄人的口招致毀滅。

en: A rich man's wealth is his strong city; the poverty of the poor is their ruin.
zh: 富翁的財物是他的堅城， 窮人的貧乏是他滅亡的因由。

en: The wage of the righteous leads to life, the gain of the wicked to sin.
zh: 義人的工價就是生命， 惡人所得的卻是刑罰。

en: Whoever heeds instruction is on the path to life, but he who rejects reproof leads others astray.
zh: 遵守教訓的，走在生命的路上； 離棄責備的，卻是走上錯路。

en: The one who conceals hatred has lying lips, and whoever utters slander is a fool.
zh: 隱藏怨恨的，嘴裡必出謊言； 散播謠言的，是愚昧人。

en: When words are many, transgression is not lacking, but whoever restrains his lips is prudent.
zh: 多言多語難免有過失； 約束自己嘴唇的，是明慧人。

en: The tongue of the righteous is choice silver; the heart of the wicked is of little worth.
zh: 義人的舌頭好像純銀， 惡人的心思毫無價值。

en: The lips of the righteous feed many, but fools die for lack of sense.
zh: 義人的嘴唇培育多人， 愚妄人因無知死亡。

en: The blessing of the LORD makes rich, and he adds no sorrow with it.
zh: 耶和華所賜的福使人富足， 並不加上愁煩。

en: Doing wrong is like a joke to a fool, but wisdom is pleasure to a man of understanding.
zh: 愚昧人以行惡為嬉戲， 聰明人卻以智慧為樂。

en: What the wicked dreads will come upon him, but the desire of the righteous will be granted.
zh: 惡人所怕的，必臨到他身上； 義人所願的，必蒙應允。

en: When the tempest passes, the wicked is no more, but the righteous is established forever.
zh: 暴風一過，惡人就歸於無有， 義人卻有永遠的根基。

en: Like vinegar to the teeth and smoke to the eyes, so is the sluggard to those who send him.
zh: 醋怎樣使牙酸倒，煙怎樣薰目， 懶惰人也怎樣使差他的人難受。

en: The fear of the LORD prolongs life, but the years of the wicked will be short.
zh: 敬畏耶和華可以延年益壽， 惡人的年歲必被減少。

en: The hope of the righteous brings joy, but the expectation of the wicked will perish.
zh: 義人的盼望使他們喜樂， 惡人的希望終必幻滅。

en: The way of the LORD is a stronghold to the blameless, but destruction to evildoers.
zh: 耶和華的道是完全人的保障， 卻是作孽的人滅亡的因由。

en: The righteous will never be removed, but the wicked will not dwell in the land.
zh: 義人永不動搖， 惡人卻不得安居在地上。

en: The mouth of the righteous brings forth wisdom, but the perverse tongue will be cut off.
zh: 義人的口結出智慧的果子， 乖謬的舌頭必被割除。

en: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable, but the mouth of the wicked, what is perverse.
zh: 義人的嘴使人喜悅， 惡人的口說乖謬的話。
